message:
fix: CLI subprocess timeout, empty cliCommand validation, stale error messages

1. cliGenerateObject had no timeout — a hanging CLI tool (waiting for
   input, network issue) would block forever. Added 120s timeout with
   proc.kill() and proper clearTimeout on success to prevent timer leaks
   and unhandled rejections.

2. cliCommand accepted empty strings via zod schema. An empty string
   passes truthiness checks in resolveCliCommand but Bun.spawn([""])
   fails with a confusing OS error. Added z.string().min(1).optional().

3. Updated stale error/recovery messages in audit.ts and utils.ts that
   only mentioned OpenAI/Anthropic/Google to also list Ollama, Bedrock,
   and CLI tools as options.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
